name: 86" Rustproof Basic Tension Aluminum Shower Curtain Rod - Threshold™
description:
Get rid of that dingy white rod and upgrade your shower with this 86-inch Basic Tension Aluminum Shower Curtain Rod from Threshold™. Sleek, simple and easy to install, it adjusts between 52 and 86 inches to perfectly fit your space. It's just the thing to hold up your shower curtain, and works with any shower curtain hooks or rings.

Threshold™: Quality & Design / Casual classics for house and home.
